roles.name: planner
roles.description: Builds the task DAG, budgets, and recursion boundaries.

roles.name: executor
roles.description: Runs bounded OpenHands, Codex, or terminal work sessions.

roles.name: security_reviewer
roles.description: Applies approval gates to risky actions and runtime exposure changes.

roles.name: memory_curator
roles.description: Persists compaction summaries into Obsidian and Qdrant-friendly artifacts.

roles.name: session_manager
roles.description: Rolls sessions at 95% token usage and keeps the ledger connected.
